text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I peek into the dance studio to see Copano
Rickey alone, racking her brain over something.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Trainer! I was wondering whether I could find
a way to work feng shui into my choreography!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
So I came up with some moves and showed them
to the teacher and everyone!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But nobody liked it! They all said my dancing was
too weird! But it's not weird at all!
choice_data_list: Can you show me some of your moves?
Can you show me some of your moves?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Sure! The concept is the Four Guardians that are
crucial to feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: First is the Azure Dragon! Gyahhh!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Then it's the Vermilion Bird! Screeeech!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Next, it's the White Tiger! Rawrrr!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And finally, the Black Tortoise! Crawling along on
its belly! Ungh, ungh!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: So! What do you think?!
choice_data_list: Well, your White Tiger was pretty cute.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: See?!
choice_data_list:
Overall, I thought those moves were pretty
weird, though...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaat?! But they're happy moves that draw on
the power of the Four Guardians!
choice_data_list:
Could you make the feng shui aspects a bit
subtler?
Maybe it'd be more fun if the dance moves made everyone happy.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You might be right... "Everything in moderation"
applies to feng shui, too.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I guess I went a little overboard trying to
make everyone happy!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the advice, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey comes up with some new
choreography, and I hear it receives a much
warmer reception.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... What's most important is that everyone
has a good time.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Nobody's going to be happy doing something
they're not into. Okay, I'll drop my choreography
and go with the original moves!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
After all, if everyone else is happy, then I'm
happy. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, Copano Rickey goes straight back
to cheerfully practicing the original moves.
